architecture.summary: Single-command modification in vskill CLI. Reuse searchSkills() API, re-invoke addCommand with owner/repo/skill 3-part format for install flow. No new services or components.

integrations.summary: Uses existing searchSkills() API from verified-skill.com. No new external integrations. Re-routes through existing addCommand 3-part handler.

ui-ux.summary: TTY: interactive promptChoice selection from ranked results. Non-TTY: print list + exit code 1. Display format matches find command. --yes auto-picks first non-blocked.

performance.summary: N/A - CLI command, single API call to search endpoint. No performance concerns beyond existing API latency.

security.summary: Blocked skills shown but not installable. Existing blocklist/trust-tier checks in addCommand 3-part handler remain intact. No new security surface.

edge-cases.summary: Search API failure falls back to existing installFromRegistry. All blocked results = zero installable error. Exact skillSlug match gets priority in ranking. owner/repo and owner/repo/skill formats unchanged.
